like if ur defense is 10 shield rn at lv1
lv6 def would be 20 shield
If lv1 is half of 6, then 6 is also double of 1.
yes

Pretty important, depending on the cards they have different effects.

Some gives you more alienus for example

Or gives more shield

Basically you use her rouse and 3 cost. Then a couple of reloads . Reloads make it so that when an ally uses their exalt Vort does an extra attack called pursuit (like follow up attack in HSR if you're familiar with that). After 3 pursuits you change tentacle stance to red and press Vort exalt and boom
